Added: head/net/freeswitch-core-devel/files/patch-libs-spandsp-configure.ac
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/freeswitch-core-devel/files/patch-libs-spandsp-configure.ac	Thu Sep 20 21:09:41 2012	(r304599)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- libs/spandsp/configure.ac.orig	2012-09-19 16:28:24.349415841 +0200
++++ libs/spandsp/configure.ac	2012-09-19 16:28:37.991415791 +0200
+@@ -186,7 +186,6 @@
+ AC_CHECK_HEADERS([string.h])
+ AC_CHECK_HEADERS([strings.h])
+ AC_CHECK_HEADERS([malloc.h])
+-AC_CHECK_HEADERS([tgmath.h], [INSERT_TGMATH_HEADER="#include <tgmath.h>"])
+ AC_CHECK_HEADERS([math.h], [INSERT_MATH_HEADER="#include <math.h>"])
+ AC_CHECK_HEADERS([float.h])
+ AC_CHECK_HEADERS([fcntl.h])
